title: oxera vanuatuensis
intro: Oxera vanuatuensis, also known as the Vanuatu oxera, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a shrub native to the Pacific island nation of Vanuatu, valued for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Oxera vanuatuensis can be prepared as a tea or infusion for its health benefits, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies in the Pacific region.
